overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a science fiction video game showing a character in white robes exploring a dimly lit spaceship interior. The character moves through a compact living quarters featuring a seating area, sleeping bunk, and game table before approaching an exit door.

scene_state.functional_zone: spaceship crew quarters entry with seating and storage

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the living area, observing the yellow seating and storage containers

entered.detail: curved yellow and black seating furniture against the left wall
tall industrial metal racks holding various equipment and containers
rectangular white plastic containers stacked on shelves and floor
wall-mounted sleeping bunk with dark red bedding and white pillows

segments.scene_description: The character begins exploring a compact, industrial spaceship living quarters. A yellow padded sofa sits to the left while metal shelving units line the right wall. The character walks forward toward a sleeping bunk visible in the distance, passing white storage crates arranged on the floor.

events.description: approaching the warm glow of a desk lamp illuminating the sleeping area

agents.ego_description: examining the sleeping bunk and desk area, moving slowly past the illuminated workstation

entered.detail: warm yellow desk lamp casting light on papers and objects
large circular metallic ventilation unit mounted on the wall

segments.scene_description: The character enters the sleeping quarters where warm lamplight contrasts with the cool ambient lighting. The bunk bed with red blanket is now prominent, with a circular wall vent visible to the left. The character moves past the illuminated desk, and a game table becomes visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: recreation area with strategy game table and airlock exit

events.description: moving from sleeping area into the recreation space with holochess table

agents.ego_description: approaching the holochess game table and continuing toward the airlock exit door

entered.detail: square table with holographic game pieces arranged for play
wall shelf displaying a red spherical planet model and small containers
large metallic door with diamond-patterned padding on the frame
padded diamond-pattern wall sections flanking the exit

segments.scene_description: The character enters the final area of the quarters featuring a holochess game table with pieces arranged for play. Above the table, a shelf holds a red planet model. The character moves past the table toward a large airlock door with quilted wall panels, which appears to be the exit from the quarters.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a compact spaceship interior that transitions from an industrial living area into a cozy sleeping nook and finally toward an exit airlock. It begins by moving past a yellow padded sofa and metal shelving, gliding over white storage crates toward a distant sleeping bunk. As the character enters the sleeping quarters, the cool ambient light shifts into warm lamplight that illuminates a bunk bed with a red blanket and a nearby desk. The scene then opens into a final area featuring a holochess table topped with a red planet model, before the camera turns toward a large airlock door set against quilted wall panels.
